title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies:
HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
